body.title: Fix broken ygm_check UserPromptSubmit hook path
body.result: Verified: hook runs via devices.claude.ygm_check, exits 0 (IMAP refused is expected when bus not running)
body.description:
The UserPromptSubmit hook in ~/.claude/settings.json references `agent_datacenter` which no longer exists — the directory was renamed to `UnseenUniversity`. The hook silently fails on every query due to `|| true`.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/.claude/settings.json
**Design rules:** none apply (settings-file fix, not code)
**Scope boundary:** Change the cd path in the ygm_check hook command; no other hooks touched. Note: user asked if this was a usage-display hook — it is not; ygm_check injects IMAP mailbox nudges into query context, not usage stats.
**Completion criteria:** Run `cd /home/akien/dev/src/UnseenUniversity && python3 -m devices.claude.ygm_check 2>/dev/null` manually and confirm it exits 0; `settings.json` hook no longer references `agent_datacenter`.
body.no_commit_reason: settings.json is not in the repo
